queryStat.query:
SELECT c.name, COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM customers c
JOIN events e ON e.customer_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.name

findings.message: Large sequential scan detected on events (20000 rows)

recommendations.reasoning: Join column "customer_id" used in Hash Join ((e.customer_id = c.id))
recommendations.riskNote: Indexes improve reads but add write overhead; validate with EXPLAIN ANALYZE before applying in production.
